summary: Matrix recording with a crisp, outstanding mix captures one of the best 1990 shows, highlighted by an unforgettable “Loser” performance.
review: Fans rave about this matrix source’s crystal‑clear balance – the SBD feed shines through and makes the show sound as good as it gets. The concert is repeatedly called a top‑tier 1990 performance, with the legendary “Loser” singled out as a career‑high moment. Negative comments focus on the tape’s removal from the archive rather than its musical or sonic quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (5 of 8) give 5‑star praise for both performance and sound, describing the mix as outstanding; a few low scores relate to availability issues, not audio quality, so overall rating stays high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, balanced matrix blend with a very clear SBD component; no complaints about muddiness, drop‑outs or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert bursts out of the gate and maintains high energy through to the end, delivering a nonstop flow that many fans rank among the best of the era.
